The '''Dartibek system''',<ref name="GG4" /> also known as the '''Moltok system''',<ref name="SWR">[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]</ref> was located in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="AOC" /> It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Moltok/Legends|Moltok]], home to the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]]<ref name="GG4" /> and [[Makurth/Legends|Makurth]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="CCG" />
